ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "market_open_time" TEXT /* Time when the market opens */,
  "market_close_time" TEXT /* Time when the market closes */,
  "trading_days" TEXT /* Days of the week the market is open */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the type belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type the stock belongs to */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES stock_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the price data */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., API, web scraping) */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_sources" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the portfolio belongs to */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio record was last updated */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial investment amount */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio stock record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio stock record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the transaction belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the transaction is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share of the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged on the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend, comparison) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the result belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the result is for */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article record was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES price_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_article_sources" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "article_id")
)
